games.title: Heat - Tunnel Vision
games.opinion: The second expansion for Heat: Pedal to the Metal on BGA, released last year. It introduces new features like tunnels (affecting card discard) and new movement cards for slipstreaming, as well as four new championship cards. It also includes the Netherlands map, which is quicker and does not feature tunnels. The reviewer views this as good additional content for a favorite game.

games.title: Heat: Pedal to the Metal
games.opinion: The base game for the expansions, which the reviewer states is one of their favorite games to play on BGA, and one they constantly return to.

games.title: Heavy Rain
games.opinion: The first expansion for Heat: Pedal to the Metal.

summary: This video introduces 'Heat - Tunnel Vision,' the second expansion for 'Heat: Pedal to the Metal' available on BoardGameArena (BGA). It details the expansion's new features, including tunnels (which modify card discard rules), new movement cards allowing for slipstreaming, and new championship cards. It also mentions a new Netherlands map. The video provides ratings for this expansion, the base game, and the first expansion, expressing a positive sentiment about the continued content for the game series.
classification: new game including how to play and rating
_vid_title: How to play Heat - Tunnel Vision, Newest expasion to BGA.

games.title: Love Letter
games.opinion: A great tiny little game suitable for quick plays on the go. The updated BGA version looks very well done and includes additional cards like the Spy and Chancellor, enhancing the gameplay experience.

summary: The video announces the return of the popular game Love Letter to BoardGameArena (BGA) in beta, highlighting its updated artwork and the inclusion of new cards. The reviewer provides a brief overview of the game's basic rules and expresses positive impressions of its implementation on BGA, noting it's a good game to have on the platform.
classification: new game including how to play
_vid_title: It's Back, this Loved Game is Back to BGA in Beta.

games.title: Watergate
games.opinion: A two-player asymmetric game where one player is Nixon and the other is the editor. The video provides a detailed tutorial on its rules, win conditions (Nixon needs five momentum tokens, Editor needs to connect two informants with evidence to Nixon), game phases, card mechanics (power, events, removal from game), and the movement of various tokens like momentum, initiative, and evidence on the board, demonstrating gameplay on Board Game Arena.

summary: This video is a detailed 'how to play' tutorial for the two-player asymmetric board game Watergate, specifically demonstrating it on Board Game Arena (BGA). It covers the distinct goals for the Nixon player (gain five momentum tokens) and the Editor player (connect two informants with evidence to Nixon), explains the three game phases (initial, card, evaluation), and delves into card actions, power values, and how different tokens (momentum, initiative, evidence) move and affect gameplay. The tutorial walks through several turns, illustrating card plays, reactions, and strategic decisions for both sides.
_vid_title: Watergate How to Play on BGA Tutorial

games.title: Lodge
games.opinion: The reviewer is currently obsessed with Lodge, predicting it will be in their top 10 games of 2026. They praise it as a very simple yet strategic game.

summary: This video is a detailed 'how to play' guide for the strategic board game Lodge. The presenter, Sasha, explains the core mechanics, including building rooms, placing guests to score points based on color matching and preferred floors, and building amenities. It also covers turn structure, display refreshing, and the end game condition, allowing viewers to learn how to play on Board Game Arena.
_vid_title: How to Play LODGE – A Brilliant Strategic Game!

games.title: Dice Mission
games.opinion: An instructional overview of the game's rules and mechanics, demonstrating how to play on Board Game Arena.

summary: This video provides a concise 'how-to-play' guide for the board game 'Dice Mission', specifically detailing its implementation on Board Game Arena. It covers game setup, mission card types (solo, versus, team, special), winning conditions, the two phases of each round (mission phase for rolling dice and debriefing phase for completing missions), dice rolling and rerolling mechanics, rules for completing different mission types, the role of gadget cards, and options for players who cannot fulfill a mission in a turn.
_vid_title: Dice Mission - How to Play in 4 Mins!
